headlines.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
headlines.summary: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.

headlines.title: Four killed as school minibus collides with train in Belgium
headlines.summary: Two schoolchildren, their chaperone and the minibus driver were killed in the crash.

headlines.title: Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes and tells foreign nationals to leave
headlines.summary: Comes after the Ukrainian capital suffered one of the biggest aerial assaults of the war overnight on Saturday.

headlines.title: Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes
headlines.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon after PM Netanyahu vows to 'crush' Hezbollah.

headlines.title: Ebola needs swift response to prevent catastrophe, says DR Congo governor
headlines.summary: The governor of Ituri said the more time they lose, the closer the province is to disaster.

headlines.title: Rubio says Iran deal could take days as US launches fresh strikes
headlines.summary: Iran's top negotiator is seeking agreement on the release of around $24 billion of Iranian funds frozen overseas.

headlines.title: North Korea fires projectiles including short-range ballistic missile
headlines.summary: South Korea's military reported the launches toward waters off the country's west coast.

headlines.title: US and Armenia sign strategic partnership agreement
headlines.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Armenian Foreign Minister signed the agreement in Yerevan.

headlines.title: US military carried out 'self-defense' strikes in Iran
headlines.summary: Strikes targeted missile launch sites and boats placing mines, even as Trump said negotiations were 'proceeding nicely.'

headlines.title: Sonny Rollins, saxophonist and restless genius of jazz, dead at 95
headlines.summary: Known as the 'saxophone colossus,' Rollins had a lauded career spanning decades.
